title: Sour Sausage and Vegetable Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by German and Filipino cuisines, featuring sour sausage and a variety of vegetables.

ingredients.name: Sour tomatoes
ingredients.notes: such as sinigang mix or fresh tomatoes

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove sausage from pot and set aside.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add carrots and potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add sour tomatoes and stir to combine.
Return sausage to pot and stir to combine.
Bring stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Cook couscous according to package instructions.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
